---
title: "Miss Hill"
---

## Miss Hill

### Description

lame friend of the Jones-Batemans

### Biography

CMY describes this woman to [[person:1520]Florence Wilford] as \'sister of Mr Rowland Hill\'.  Unfortunately, there are several possible Rowland Hills, and it is uncertain which CMY means here.

### Letters

- Letter from October 10, 1890.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
